description: On a windy day, the site is generating a lot of dust. The superintendent must implement dust control measures to comply with environmental regulations.

nodes.task_description: Identify the need for dust control due to high winds.

expected_outcome.expected: The superintendent recognizes the compliance risk.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the water truck to spray down all haul roads and exposed soil areas on the site.

expected_outcome.expected: The water truck is deployed to mitigate the dust.

nodes.task_description: Log the dust control measures taken in the daily site log.

expected_outcome.expected: The proactive compliance measure is documented.
